G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
a head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : (∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail✝ → b = a) → tail✝ = replicate tail✝.length a
⊢ (∀ (b : α), b ∈ head✝ :: tail✝ → b = a) → head✝ :: tail✝ = replicate (head✝ :: tail✝).length a

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : (∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail → b = a) → tail = replicate tail.length a
⊢ (∀ (b : α), b ∈ head :: tail → b = a) → head :: tail = replicate (head :: tail).length a

G2.label:
α : Type u_1
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : (∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail → b = head) → tail = replicate tail.length head
right : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ tail → a = head
⊢ ∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail → b = head

G3.label:
case a
α : Type u_1
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : (∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail → b = head) → tail = replicate tail.length head
right : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ tail → a = head
b : α
a : b ∈ tail
⊢ b ∈ tail
